user.title: TikTok Account
user.description:
Enter your TikTok app credentials. You need a TikTok Developer App with Login Kit enabled.

Leave the Redirect URI field empty to auto-detect, or enter a custom value if the auto-detected one does not match what is registered in the TikTok Developer portal.

data.top_videos_count: Number of top videos to track
data.redirect_uri: Redirect URI override (leave empty for auto-detect)

auth.title: Authorize TikTok
auth.description: Click the link below to authorize Home Assistant to access your TikTok account.

abort.auth_failed: Authorization failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to TikTok API.

data.top_videos_count: Number of top videos to track
